text.title: Product Lifecycle Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying product lifecycle management end-to-end.

step.name: collect-signals
step.action: Extract yoy_growth, monthly_churn, NPS, market_share for the product.
step.decision-gate: If any signal missing, escalate to data team.

step.name: classify-stage
step.action: Run stage-suggest.sh to propose a stage based on signal thresholds.
step.decision-gate: If signal pattern is mixed, escalate to portfolio review.

step.name: match-strategy
step.action: Author investment_strategy paragraph matching the stage.

step.name: write-transition-memo
step.action: Write transition_memo if stage changed; else write 'no change' memo with signals.

step.name: sunset-if-decline
step.action: If stage == decline, kick off sunset plan (templates/sunset-plan.md) within 30 days.
step.decision-gate: If stage==decline and no sunset plan after 30d, escalate.
